title: eriophorum cyperinum var. pelium
intro: Eriophorum cyperinum var. pelium, also known as Cotton Grass or Cotton Sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to northern Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in saponins, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Cotton Grass can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin problems.
